prep.summary: You are facing a severe escalation in security risk—highlighted by a massive application-tier container vulnerability spike to 42,000 exposures and a Second Line override to a "high" risk rating. Simultaneously, you must navigate critical platform transitions—including the Microsoft Teams migration, Skan versus Celonis task-mining disputes, and the integration of Sierra's conversational AI. Resolving these immediate tactical fires while establishing the 2026 GenAI foundational architecture remains your primary objective for the week.
tasks: Demand a specific list of remediation steps from the Second Line—targeting 1 to 5 actionable goals—to correct the qualitative risk rating override.
Partner with Chain Guard to build hardened images—mitigating the massive influx of Netty and Tomcat container vulnerabilities.
Produce a high-level one-pager for leadership—explaining the distinct capabilities of Skan versus Celonis—to bypass current RFP procurement friction.
Prioritize immediate architecture support for CyberArk, SailPoint, and Okta—ensuring the high-risk WIAM and PAM streams hit their targets.
prep.title: Tech Fellow Standup

events.summary: Artifacts to support Products and Services

focus_html:
Focus · Next up
8:00 AM — 9:00 AM

Tech Fellow Standup

Prep

You are facing a severe escalation in security risk—highlighted by a massive application-tier container vulnerability spike to 42,000 exposures and a Second Line override to a "high" risk rating. Simultaneously, you must navigate critical platform transitions—including the Microsoft Teams migration, Skan versus Celonis task-mining disputes, and the integration of Sierra's conversational AI. Resolving these immediate tactical fires while establishing the 2026 GenAI foundational architecture remains your primary objective for the week.

  • Demand a specific list of remediation steps from the Second Line—targeting 1 to 5 actionable goals—to correct the qualitative risk rating override.
  • Partner with Chain Guard to build hardened images—mitigating the massive influx of Netty and Tomcat container vulnerabilities.
  • Produce a high-level one-pager for leadership—explaining the distinct capabilities of Skan versus Celonis—to bypass current RFP procurement friction.
  • Prioritize immediate architecture support for CyberArk, SailPoint, and Okta—ensuring the high-risk WIAM and PAM streams hit their targets.
